purpose: Add 'proposed' flag support to the base:adr skill so the curator can autonomously scaffold ADRs with Status: Proposed pending user review, completing the promote_to_adr seam contract.

public_api.name: proposed flag (base:adr)
public_api.description: When 'proposed' is included in args, the scaffolded ADR has Status: Proposed instead of Status: Accepted.

test_targets: VQ-S4-002: proposed flag => Status: Proposed; manual note updated
VQ-S4-003: ADR-template.md Status line documents Proposed as valid alternative
VQ-S4-004: curator promote_to_adr rule passes proposed; S4 placeholder removed
VQ-S4-005: omitting proposed still yields Status: Accepted
VQ-S4-006: all S1 changes intact in project-curator.md
VQ-S4-007: consistent proposed semantics across all three files
VQ-S4-008: feature.md and curator both pass proposed (feature.md already done in S2)
